name: Elemental Transfiguration: Bloom Blessing
title: Elemental Transfiguration: Bloom Blessing
desc: Nurtured by rain and soil, life thrives in endless bloom.
in_play_description:
Roll Phase: Always roll 2 Hydro Dice and 2 Dendro Dice.
After you trigger Bloom reaction(s): Discard this card, then choose either Bloom Blessing: Amrita or Bloom Blessing: Overgrow and add it to your Hand.

skills.desc:
